creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Thanks for the patch.
The reason I have not updated this port yet is that it requires the new verison of
lensfun to compile (0.2.5, while we have 0.2.3 in ports now).
I asked the maintainer for update, before this happens we can't commit this one.

-- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
